PRJ — 03

Projects

Mergers & Acquisitions Analysis: Microsoft's Acquisition of Activision Blizzard
Independent project · Microsoft Excel · 2026
View on GitHub Download Workbook

Built an M&A financial model analysing Microsoft's $71.1B acquisition of Activision Blizzard using each company's public financial statements, then performed deal structuring analysis and supported deal execution by preparing valuation tables and drafting transaction memos — estimating a 45.3% acquisition premium, $800M in annual synergies, and 1.81% accretion through valuation, synergy and accretion/dilution models.

Financial Modeling and Valuation of Blackstone Inc.
Independent project · Microsoft Excel · 2026
View on GitHub Download Workbook

Built a three-statement financial model, DCF valuation and a leveraged buyout (LBO) model for Blackstone Inc. using its FY2024 annual report — forecasting free cash flow through 2027E, assessing debt capacity and equity returns through the LBO model, and running ratio analysis to estimate enterprise value.

FY24 Revenue
$5.4B

Movie Recommendation Pipeline
Group project · NIELIT internship · Python, Django & Machine Learning · 2025
View on GitHub

Built a content-based movie recommendation engine in Django, using TF-IDF and SVD dimensionality reduction to score similarity between titles. Includes a REST API and autocomplete search, with a pipeline designed to scale from a 2,000-movie demo set up to 1M+ movies.
